introSection: Grand Canyon was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Forest Park in Forest Park, Illinois, USA. The ride was previously known as Rocky Mountain Ride. The ride reportedly had a third rail that powered the train during parts of the ride.
fullText: Grand Canyon was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Forest Park in Forest Park, Illinois, USA. The ride was previously known as Rocky Mountain Ride. The ride reportedly had a third rail that powered the train during parts of the ride.
